pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-S-006 (Risk and Compliance) scores 0.455 composite (signal: moderate). Scope fit for Data Reliability Engineer: out_of_scope. Preliminary decision: exclude.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Out-of-scope exclusion is internally consistent. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: out_of_scope) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Data Reliability Engineer.

decision_rationale: Risk and Compliance is out of scope for Data Reliability Engineer.
